title: Treasury Department authorizes Iranian oil sales through August
summary_full: Iranian supertankers have switched on their transponders, after going dark during the war, as they depart the region loaded with oil.
summary_public: Iranian supertankers have switched on their transponders, after going dark during the war, as they depart the region loaded with oil.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Treasury Department authorizes Iranian oil sales through August
